title: bis / quarterly review / market rotation | Economic Commentary | Markets recalibrate amid shifting currents
summary: The BIS Quarterly Review for March 2026 documents significant market rotations during late 2025 through early 2026, with investors shifting away from US large cap and growth stocks toward European and Japanese equities and emerging markets, despite underlying equity index resilience. Single-stock volatility exceeded index-level volatility, and the Swiss franc's appreciation signaled risk-off sentiment while the dollar initially depreciated in risk-on environments—though geopolitical escalation in early March reversed these trends.
